BVI.note: British Virgin Islands; Sailwave/IOC uses BVI, RRS uses IVB.

CKI.note: Cook Islands; Sailwave uses CKI, RRS/IOC uses COK.

GRD.note: Grenada; Sailwave uses ISO alpha-3 GRD, RRS/IOC uses GRN.

IRI.note: Iran; Sailwave/IOC uses IRI, WS uses IRN.

NAU.note: Nauru; Sailwave uses NAU, the ISO alpha-3 is NRU (the canonical record).

SLU.note: Saint Lucia; Sailwave uses SLU, RRS uses LCA.

TCI.note: Turks and Caicos Islands; another Sailwave variant alongside TKS.

TKS.note: Turks and Caicos Islands; Sailwave uses TKS, WS uses TCA.

TON.note: Tonga; Sailwave uses TON, WS uses TGA.

TRI.note: Trinidad and Tobago; Sailwave/historical-RRS uses TRI, current RRS uses TTO.
